productDisplayName: Levis Men Grey & Navy Blue Striped Shirt
description: Composition Grey and blue striped shirt made of 100% cotton, has pocket on the left chest, half sleeves, brand mark on the left pocket, and a curved hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash on tumble dry with warm water No bleaching Use warm iron only This Levi's cotton shirt traces a relaxed silhouette, flattering all body shapes to make you look your casual best. This off-duty essential is a must-have for the modern urban male. Team it with denims and sneakers, and throw over a jacket for absolute style. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18.5"
